top_signals.title: Houthis Claim Attack on Saudi Tankers in Red Sea
top_signals.summary: The Iranian-aligned Houthis said on Thursday they struck two Saudi oil tankers as part of a naval blockade on Saudi Arabia, threatening to create a second chokepoint on global oil supplies alongside Iran's near-closure of the Strait of Hormuz.Meanwhile the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks slip; Segro shares jump on takeover; oil nears $100
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. Easyjet is set to update the markets the day after its stock took a dive as its takeover was thrown into doubt. Easyjet dropped nearly 11 per cent on Wednesday afternoon, to 593p, after reports that the EU is preparing to review its rules on foreign [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
top_signals.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.
